item.title: v2.6 — Race Pace Predictor + new tools
item.description:
RunPrep v2.6 introduces the Race Pace Predictor to help you plan pacing more confidently for your next race.
What’s new: - Race Pace Predictor: get pacing guidance designed around your race goals - New tools to support smarter pre-run decisions
Thanks for using RunPrep—more improvements coming soon.

item.title: Welcome to RunPrep Updates
item.description: You’ll see important RunPrep announcements and new features here in the app.
